topic: beautiful diff views web applications visual design CSS diff2html

sources.title: diff2html CSS stylesheet (production bundle)
keyInsights: Complete CSS variable set: --d2h-* for light and --d2h-dark-* for dark mode
Dark mode uses RGBA overlays: rgba(46,160,67,0.15) for insertions, rgba(248,81,73,0.10) for deletions
Light mode uses flat hex: #dfd for ins-bg, #fee8e9 for del-bg
.d2h-dark-color-scheme and .d2h-auto-color-scheme class selectors for theming
GitHub dark palette: bg #0d1117, file-header #161b22, border #30363d

sources.title: diff2html GitHub README
keyInsights: Diff2HtmlUI extends Diff2HtmlConfig with synchronisedScroll, highlight, fileListToggle, fileListStartVisible, fileContentToggle, stickyFileHeaders
draw(), highlightCode(), synchronisedScroll(), fileListToggle(), stickyFileHeaders() must be called separately
colorScheme option: 'light' | 'dark' | 'auto'
Slim bundle allows custom hljs instance for tree-shaking

sources.title: diff2html render-utils.ts - CSS class constants
keyInsights: CSSLineClass values: d2h-ins, d2h-del, d2h-cntx, d2h-info, d2h-ins d2h-change, d2h-del d2h-change
ColorSchemeType maps to CSS classes: DARK->d2h-dark-color-scheme, AUTO->d2h-auto-color-scheme, LIGHT->d2h-light-color-scheme

sources.title: diff2html line-by-line renderer
keyInsights: HTML hierarchy: wrapper > file-diff > file-path > block-header > line
Config: renderNothingWhenEmpty, matchingMaxComparisons (2500), maxLineSizeInBlockForComparison (200)

sources.title: diff2html side-by-side renderer
keyInsights: Produces FileHtml: { left: string, right: string }
d2h-code-side-linenumber, d2h-code-side-line, d2h-emptyplaceholder CSS classes
matching: 'lines' | 'words' config option

sources.title: diff2html UI base TypeScript interface
keyInsights: Diff2HtmlUIConfig interface with full type definitions
highlightLanguages: Map<string, string> for extension-to-language mapping
smartSelection deprecated in v3.1.0

sources.title: react-diff-viewer styles.ts - theme variables
keyInsights: Light: addedBackground #e6ffed, removedBackground #ffeef0, wordAddedBackground #acf2bd, wordRemovedBackground #fdb8c0
Dark: addedBackground #044B53, removedBackground #632F34, gutterBackground #2c2f3a
Complete list of 15+ style keys: diffContainer, diffRemoved, diffAdded, gutter, lineNumber, wordDiff, codeFold, etc.

sources.title: react-diff-viewer README
keyInsights: DiffMethod enum: CHARS, WORDS, LINES, WORDS_WITH_SPACE, SENTENCES, CSS
extraLinesSurroundingDiff: number of context lines (default 3)
showDiffOnly: boolean to hide unchanged sections
highlightLines array with L/R prefix for line-level selection

sources.title: git-diff-view - multi-framework diff component
keyInsights: FastDiff template: character-level diff via setEnableFastDiffTemplate(true)
Supports React, Vue, Solid, Svelte
Range mode: display partial diffs via generateInstanceFromLineNumberRange()
Web Worker support for background diff processing
Pure CSS via @git-diff-view/react/styles/diff-view.css

sources.title: Shiki transformers - transformerNotationDiff
keyInsights: Syntax: // [!code ++] for additions, // [!code --] for removals
Output classes: span.line.diff.add and span.line.diff.remove
Container class: pre.has-diff
matchAlgorithm: 'v1' | 'v3' option

sources.title: Shiki dual themes guide
keyInsights: themes: { light: 'min-light', dark: 'nord' } for dual mode
CSS variables: --shiki-dark, --shiki-dark-bg for dark mode overrides
Class-based switching: html.dark .shiki selectors
defaultColor: false for fully custom CSS control

sources.title: jsdiff - diff computation library
keyInsights: Myers diff algorithm with pre/post-diff speedups
maxEditLength option to abort expensive diffs
timeout option for time-bounded diffs
Extensible: override tokenize(), equals(), join() for custom diff logic

sources.title: diff-match-patch - Google's character diff library
keyInsights: Myers algorithm for character-level intra-line highlighting
Used by CodeMirror 5 merge view for chunk computation
Patch module for applying diffs to modified originals

sources.title: CodeMirror merge extension
keyInsights: MergeView: { a: {doc, extensions}, b: {doc, extensions}, parent }
unifiedMergeView({ original }): single-pane inline diff
updateOriginalDoc transaction annotation for streaming

sources.title: CodeMirror 5 merge.js implementation
keyInsights: SVG Bezier curves connect related chunks between split panes
Ratio-based synchronized scrolling between editors
ViewMarker + line-class API for change highlighting
250ms debounce on diff recalculation for fast edits

sources.title: GitHub Desktop diff view architecture
keyInsights: Modular: separate components for side-by-side-diff, syntax-highlighting, image-diffs
text-diff-expansion.ts for collapsible unchanged sections
diff-search-input.tsx for in-diff text search
get-tokens.ts for lexical tokenization before syntax highlighting

sources.title: react-diff-view - token-based React diff component
keyInsights: renderToken prop for pluggable syntax highlighting
Widget system: attach React elements to specific changed lines
CSS variables: --diff-code-insert-background-color, --diff-gutter-delete-background-color
Change key system: 'I'/'D'/'N' prefix + line numbers
Gutter modes: 'default', 'none', 'anchor' (clickable line links)

sources.title: TanStack Virtual - headless virtualizer
keyInsights: estimateSize callback for variable row heights
measureElement for self-correcting actual heights after render
overscan: render N extra items above/below viewport
count + getScrollElement + estimateSize are the core three required options

sources.title: react-simple-code-editor - overlay technique
keyInsights: Overlay pattern: highlighted <pre> positioned over <textarea>
-webkit-text-fill-color: transparent to hide textarea text while preserving cursor
Font family/weight/style must match exactly between layers

sources.title: Prism.js syntax highlighter
keyInsights: diff-highlight plugin: highlights embedded languages inside diff blocks
language-diff-typescript class for combined diff+syntax highlighting
2KB minified + gzipped base, plugins added separately
Toolbar plugin for copy button integration

sources.title: highlight.js - syntax highlighter
keyInsights: 192 languages, 512 themes
Automatic language detection via highlightAuto()
Used by diff2html for syntax highlighting integration
github.min.css / github-dark.min.css are the canonical themes for diff views

sources.title: WCAG 2.1 color contrast techniques
keyInsights: Red/green alone fails for ~8% of male users (deuteranopia)
AA standard: 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text
Supplementary visual cues (symbols, patterns, borders) required alongside color
+/- gutter prefixes satisfy non-color-only requirement
